title: Configure Pipeline Scheduling
description: Configure automated scheduling for the orchestrator pipeline to eliminate manual execution. Currently runs manually, needs daily schedule at 6:00 AM.
acceptanceCriteria: Schedule configured and active in Fabric workspace
Documentation updated with schedule details in pipeline_schedule.md
Power BI reports refresh automatically after pipeline run
dependencies: Pipeline must be fully tested and working
Source systems must be available at scheduled time (6:00 AM)
Fabric workspace must have capacity for scheduled execution
notes: DEPENDENCY: Task 011 (Error Handling) should be complete before scheduling
Rationale: Automated pipeline needs proper error handling and retry logic in place
Pipeline currently has no schedule configured - runs manually
Recommended: Daily at 6:00 AM Europe/Stockholm (after nightly Azure SQL batch)
Schedule can be paused for maintenance periods
For portfolio showcase, document that scheduling is configured
CLAUDE: Document schedule configuration steps, write pipeline_schedule.md
ERIK: Configure schedule in Fabric UI (this is primarily an Erik task)

recommendedSchedule.rationale: Procurement data refreshed nightly in Azure SQL (by 5:00 AM)
